name: Black Bean Lasagna
recipeIngredient: 2 cans black beans, rinsed and drained (15 oz each)
15 ounces light or nonfat ricotta cheese
1/2 cup fat-free egg product or 4 egg whites
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook and drain noodles according to package directions (or see note).
2. While noodles are cooking, heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
3. Cook onion and garlic in the oil, stirring frequently, until onion is tender.
4. Stir in water, cilantro, beans, tomatoes, and tomato paste. Reduce heat.
5. Simmer uncovered about 15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
6. In a medium bowl, combine remaining ingredients except Monterey Jack cheese.
7. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
8. Layer one-third each of the noodles, bean mixture, ricotta mixture, and then Monterey Jack cheese in a rectangular 13x9x2-inch baking dish. Repeat layers twice.
9. Bake uncovered for 30-35 minutes until hot and bubbly. Let stand 10-15 minutes before serving.
